root_text.an8.3:1.1: “Aṭṭhahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu sabrahmacārīnaṁ appiyo ca hoti amanāpo ca agaru ca abhāvanīyo ca.
root_text.an8.3:1.3: Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu appiyapasaṁsī ca hoti, piyagarahī ca, lābhakāmo ca, sakkārakāmo ca, ahiriko ca, anottappī ca, pāpiccho ca, micchādiṭṭhi ca.
root_text.an8.3:1.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, aṭṭhahi dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu sabrahmacārīnaṁ appiyo ca hoti amanāpo ca agaru ca abhāvanīyo ca.
root_text.an8.3:2.1: Aṭṭhahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu sabrahmacārīnaṁ piyo ca hoti manāpo ca garu ca bhāvanīyo ca.
root_text.an8.3:2.3: Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu na appiyapasaṁsī ca hoti, na piyagarahī ca, na lābhakāmo ca, na sakkārakāmo ca, hirīmā ca hoti, ottappī ca, appiccho ca, sammādiṭṭhi ca.
root_text.an8.3:2.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, aṭṭhahi dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu sabrahmacārīnaṁ piyo ca hoti manāpo ca garu ca bhāvanīyo cā”ti.

translation_text.an8.3:1.1: “Mendicants, a mendicant with eight qualities is disliked and disapproved by their spiritual companions, not respected or admired.
translation_text.an8.3:1.3: It’s when a mendicant praises the disliked and criticizes the liked. They desire material things and honor. They lack conscience and prudence. They have corrupt wishes and wrong view.
translation_text.an8.3:1.4: A mendicant with these eight qualities is disliked and disapproved by their spiritual companions, not respected or admired.
translation_text.an8.3:2.1: A mendicant with eight qualities is liked and approved by their spiritual companions, and respected and admired.
translation_text.an8.3:2.3: It’s when a mendicant doesn’t praise the disliked and criticize the liked. They don’t desire material things and honor. They have conscience and prudence. They have few desires and right view.
translation_text.an8.3:2.4: A mendicant with these eight qualities is liked and approved by their spiritual companions, and respected and admired.”
